name: muzi-going-skills
description: Muzi Going 的 Claude skills 商店 — curated skills by Muzi Going Li

plugins.name: prompt-coach
plugins.description: 問對問題教練 — turns a vague, underspecified request into a Goal / Constraints / Obstacle breakdown, then produces a ready-to-use structured prompt.

plugins.name: multi-perspective-panel
plugins.description: 多角度組隊思考 — reviews any decision, plan, or open question from four independent thinking angles (critical/creative/communication/interaction), as a parallel panel or an adversarial red/blue team debate.

plugins.name: ai-roleplay-practice
plugins.description: AI 角色扮演練習夥伴 — sets up an interactive roleplay to rehearse difficult conversations with AI playing any persona you define, with structured feedback at the end.

plugins.name: web-security-reviewer
plugins.description: 防禦性安全審查 — defensive security review of your own code (Apps Script, frontend, backend): vulnerabilities, data leakage, stress/performance risks, with a severity-ranked report plus corrected code.
